landing.hero.title: Skill growth happens through people, not platforms.
landing.hero.subtitle: MENT matches your colleagues for short, focused mentoring conversations — so knowledge actually moves through your organisation, instead of sitting in silos.
landing.products.title: One platform, two ways to use it
landing.products.subtitle: Whether you mentor inside your own company or across a peer network of SMEs, MENT meets you where you are.
landing.products.intraDescription: Surface the experts already in your organisation. Match colleagues across teams for short mentoring sessions, track skill growth, and give managers a real view of where knowledge is — and where it isn't.
landing.products.interDescription: Small companies rarely have an in-house expert for everything. Pool the experience of dozens of SMEs into one trusted peer network, with privacy controls designed for cross-company mentoring.
landing.how.title: How it works
landing.how.step1Description: Members describe what they can teach and what they want to learn. Optional CV import accelerates onboarding.
landing.how.step2Description: MENT matches people on skill overlap, career bridge, and team diversity — surfacing the right colleague at the right time.
landing.how.step3Description: Mentor and mentee schedule, meet, and reflect privately. Over time, individual reflections turn into measurable team-level skill momentum.
landing.trust.title: Built for trust
landing.trust.subtitle: We treat employee data with the seriousness it deserves — and we designed the platform with privacy and compliance from day one, not as an afterthought.
landing.trust.point1: Data hosted on EU servers (Supabase, eu-central-1).
landing.trust.point2: Aligned with GDPR and the revised Swiss Federal Act on Data Protection.
landing.trust.point3: Reflections, ratings and shadow answers stay strictly private to the person who wrote them.
landing.trust.point4: AI features are opt-in and clearly disclosed — never on by default.
landing.finalCta.title: Bring MENT to your team
landing.finalCta.subtitle: We're onboarding a small group of founding companies. If you'd like to be one of them, we'd love to talk.
